creator: darius@dons.net.au
text:
The makefile tries to install xbsndsrv.man which doesn't exist.

Fix: 

Well, edit the Makefile after imake generates it (Don't know how to tell imake
a program doesn't have a man page)

Or touch xbsndsrv.man
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/games/xblast-sound
make install
